createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 formatted date of when the order was created.

currency.description: The currency used for the order in ISO 4217 format.

extendedHours.description: If true, the order is eligible for execution outside regular trading hours.

filledQuantity.description: The number of shares that have been successfully executed. Applicable to quantity orders.

filledValue.description: The total monetary value of the executed portion of the order. Applicable to orders placed by value.Note: Placing orders by value is not currently supported via the API but can be done through other Trading 212 platforms.

id.description: A unique, system-generated identifier for the order.

limitPrice.description: Applicable to LIMIT and STOP_LIMIT orders.

quantity.description: The total number of shares requested. Applicable to quantity orders.

side.description: Indicates whether the order is BUY or SELL.

status.description: The current state of the order in its lifecycle.

stopPrice.description: Applicable to STOP and STOP_LIMIT orders.

strategy.description: The strategy used to place the order, either by QUANTITY or VALUE. The API currently only supports placing orders by QUANTITY.

ticker.description: Unique instrument identifier. Get from the /instruments endpoint

value.description: The total monetary value of the order. Applicable to value orders.
